title: FOSTER PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: HANDS AND FEET FOSTER PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports foster families by providing trauma-informed TBRI training to help resource parents navigate the needs of children who have experienced neglect or abuse. To ease the transition into a new home, personalized care baskets filled with essentials, clothing, and toys, accompanied by a complimentary family dinner are provided. Eligibility: Resource parents and foster children Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 519-4562 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 519-4562 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Placement document from ODHS Child Welfare AREA SERVED: Umatilla Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Caregiver Training * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Caregiver Training * Foster Parents Personal/Grooming Supplies * Foster Children Shoes * Foster Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
